summary: Iteration 169 - Testing MemberDashboard refactoring and Service Desk Lock/Delete functionality. All backend tests passed (10/10). Dashboard loads successfully after login. Service Desk Lock and Delete endpoints working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: MemberDashboard.jsx successfully refactored from 3500+ lines to ~1052 lines
Lazy loading properly implemented with React.lazy() and Suspense
Lock/Delete buttons properly implemented in DoggyServiceDesk.jsx (lines 3574-3599)
Backend endpoints POST /{ticket_id}/lock and DELETE /{ticket_id} working correctly
seed_data_creation: Created test tickets for lock/delete testing (auto-cleaned)
context_for_next_testing_agent: MemberDashboard refactoring complete - dashboard loads but browser may crash during automated screenshot due to page size (expected behavior). Service Desk Lock/Delete functionality fully working. All 10 backend tests passed.

member_dashboard_refactoring.details: Dashboard loads successfully after login, URL changes to /dashboard. Browser crashes during screenshot due to large page size (expected per test request notes).

service_desk_lock.details: POST /api/tickets/{ticket_id}/lock endpoint working. Lock/Unlock toggle updates ticket state correctly.

service_desk_delete.details: DELETE /api/tickets/{ticket_id} endpoint working. Ticket removed from database after deletion.

lazy_loading_tabs.details: 17 tab components extracted and lazy-loaded: OverviewTab, PetsTab, ServicesTab, OrdersTab, RequestsTab, SettingsTab, DiningTab, CelebrationsTab, StayTab, TravelTab, AutoshipTab, ReviewsTab, AddressesTab, RewardsTab, MiraTab
